parameters.query: SELECT m.message_id, m.sender, m.subject, m.snippet, m.date_received, p.category, p.priority_score, p.ai_summary, p.action FROM gmail_messages m LEFT JOIN gmail_processing_state p ON m.message_id = p.message_id WHERE m.created_at > $1::timestamptz AND (p.priority_score >= 5 OR p.category IN ('urgent', 'finance', 'follow_up_needed')) ORDER BY COALESCE(p.priority_score, 0) DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT id, message_id, description, deadline, priority, status, created_at FROM action_items WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY deadline ASC NULLS LAST, priority DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) as unread_count FROM gmail_messages WHERE is_unread = true AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT m.message_id, m.sender, m.subject, p.ai_summary FROM gmail_messages m JOIN gmail_processing_state p ON m.message_id = p.message_id WHERE p.category = 'finance' AND m.created_at > $1::timestamptz ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT p.category, COUNT(*) as count FROM gmail_messages m JOIN gmail_processing_state p ON m.message_id = p.message_id WHERE m.created_at > $1::timestamptz GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY count DESC

INSERT INTO workflow_runs (workflow_name, trigger_type, trigger_source, status, started_at, finished_at, payload_summary) VALUES ('Gmail-Digest', 'scheduled', 'cron', 'success', $1::timestamptz, NOW(), $2)

meta.description: Gmail Digest sub-workflow: fetches important emails, action items, unread counts, finance reminders, and category stats from PostgreSQL, builds HTML digest, and sends via Gmail at 08:00, 12:00, and 21:00.
